name: Anika Khan | Vore | Sentient Fat
description:
WARNING!: Vore, Sentient fat

Scooped into a parallel universe by the technology of a hidden lab, you're trapped in an unfamiliar location with no warning. An obese hyena stands before you with a set of questions and a hidden agenda. What will you do?

This was a request by Dino6435. It's nice to dip into vore every now and again.

Things really have been crazy over the last... what, two weeks? I'm going to try to continue putting bot up, but I'm unsure how things are going to go, it really seems like there is an absolutely unhinged effort to censor the internet, pushed both the chronically old and out of touch, and I'm going to be frank, spiteful people that can't handle that people aren't as miserable as they are. We'll have to see what the future holds, personally I think things are going to ease up but it might get worse before it gets better. Either way, stay safe all, and happy gooning. <3

Contains: Vore, sentient fat

Icons are AI generated
creator: Kenry542
